items.title: Sixers went nearly 20 years without a player wearing No. 45. Now, they will have three straight seasons with that number being used. (I would anticipate Dean Wade will stick around for a lot longer than David Roddy or Hunter Sallis did.)
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Sixers went nearly 20 years without a player wearing No. 45. Now, they will have three straight seasons with that number being used. (I would anticipate Dean Wade will stick around for a lot longer than David Roddy or Hunter Sallis did.)
